events.summaryZh: 这是一场更像社区节日的免费 NAIDOC family day：表演、文化工作坊、market stalls、免费 BBQ、运动和 First Nations food trucks 都在同一处，适合开车去过一个热闹半日。
events.summaryEn: A free NAIDOC family day with performances, cultural workshops, market stalls, a community BBQ, sport and First Nations food trucks in one easy western Sydney outing.
events.referenceZh: Penrith City Council 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: Penrith City Council official event listing.

events.summaryZh: The Rocks 把雪道、欧洲风格木屋、市集、live shows、Firepit Cinema 和冬日小吃放在一起，比单一儿童活动更适合大人带着孩子一起逛、吃、拍照。
events.summaryEn: The Rocks turns into a winter market with Snow Lane, European-style huts, live shows, Firepit Cinema and food stalls, making it a stronger family wander than a kid-only activity.
events.timeEn: 10-19 July; opening hours vary by day
events.priceZh: 免费入场；部分体验需购票
events.referenceZh: The Rocks 官方 Christmas in July 页面。
events.referenceEn: The Rocks official Christmas in July event page.

events.summaryZh: Parramatta Square 的冬季夜游把 firepits、immersive cinema、小吃和现场娱乐集中在一起，白天能逛、傍晚更有节日感，适合全家轻松走一圈。
events.summaryEn: A winter city outing at Parramatta Square with firepits, immersive cinema, food and entertainment, easy to turn into a relaxed family afternoon or evening.
events.priceZh: 免费为主；部分活动需购票
events.referenceZh: AtParramatta 官方 Midwinter Festival 页面。

events.summaryZh: 从 7月16日开始，The Rocks / Circular Quay 有法国美食、音乐、街头表演、open-air cinema 和市场，适合傍晚带娃边走边吃，也不只是小朋友活动。
events.summaryEn: French food, music, street shows, open-air cinema and markets around The Rocks and Circular Quay, suitable for adults who want a lively outing with kids in tow.
events.priceZh: 免费入场；餐饮和部分体验自费
events.priceEn: Free entry; food and some experiences paid
events.referenceZh: The Rocks 官方 Bastille Festival 页面。
events.referenceEn: The Rocks official Bastille Festival page.

events.summaryZh: 经典电影加现场交响乐，比普通看电影更有仪式感；下午场适合家庭，喜欢电影、音乐和轻松剧情的大人孩子都能一起看。
events.summaryEn: A classic film screened with a live symphony, giving families a more memorable cinema-style outing than a standard movie session.
events.priceZh: 票价以官方购票页为准
events.mapQuery: ICC Sydney 14 Darling Drive Darling Harbour
events.referenceZh: Darling Harbour 官方活动页面。

events.summaryZh: 55分钟音乐剧版本，结合 physical theatre、音乐和 puppetry，适合 3岁以上；Darling Quarter 周边吃饭和游乐场都方便。
events.summaryEn: A 55-minute musical adaptation using physical theatre, music and puppetry, good for ages 3+ with food and playground options nearby.
events.mapQuery: Darling Quarter Theatre 1-25 Harbour Street Sydney
events.referenceZh: Darling Harbour 官方活动页面。

events.summaryZh: 20分钟互动活动，孩子会跟着做基础 kung fu、animal Tai Chi 和呼吸练习；适合想在 city 里短时间放电、再接 Darling Harbour 行程的家庭。
events.summaryEn: A short interactive session with basic kung fu, animal Tai Chi and breathing practice, easy to combine with a Darling Harbour walk.
events.placeZh: Chinese Garden of Friendship, Darling Harbour
events.placeEn: Chinese Garden of Friendship, Darling Harbour
events.priceZh: 每位全价成人可带1名儿童免费；5岁以下儿童本来免费
events.priceEn: One child enters free per full-paying adult; under 5s already enter free
events.mapQuery: Chinese Garden of Friendship Darling Harbour
events.referenceZh: Darling Harbour 官方活动页面。

events.summaryZh: 开放式溜冰场有企鹅辅助架和家庭票，位置在 IMAX 外面，适合作为 city 半日游的稳定备选。
events.summaryEn: An open-air rink outside IMAX with penguin skating aids and family tickets, a reliable city backup for school-holiday energy.
events.timeEn: Open this week; Sun-Thu 10:00am-8:45pm, Fri-Sat until 9:45pm
events.placeZh: Palm Grove Forecourt, outside IMAX Sydney
events.placeEn: Palm Grove Forecourt, outside IMAX Sydney
events.priceZh: 幼儿 $15；儿童 $20；家庭票 $75；成人票以购票页为准
events.priceEn: Toddlers $15; children $20; family $75; check the adult price when booking
events.mapQuery: Palm Grove Forecourt IMAX Sydney Darling Harbour
events.referenceZh: Darling Harbour 官方活动页面。
